description: Log in to Moodle as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!) and navigate to the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course. Create a Grouping named 'Lab Sections' containing the 'Monday Lab' and 'Thursday Lab' groups. Create an Assignment named 'Lab Report 1' with the description 'Upload your microscopy findings here', configured for 'Separate groups' and restricted to the 'Lab Sections' grouping.
